title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Blue Star India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Blue Star India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Blue Star India Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Allahabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Blue Star India Global Group:
Blue Star India Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India Global Group!
